name: stitch-mcp
description: Expose Google Stitch MCP tools inside Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Generate and refine UI screens with Google Stitch
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to Google Stitch so you can create projects, generate screens, edit layouts, and fetch exported HTML or screenshots through MCP tools.
defaultPrompt: Create a Stitch project for this app
Generate a mobile settings screen in Stitch
Edit this Stitch screen to match our branding
